FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_IAIDO_POWER.title: Iaido
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_IAIDO_POWER.descript: When attacked, consume [gold]Iaido[/gold] equal to the damage to negate it and counter for the same amount as attack damage. Remove all [gold]Iaido[/gold] at turn start. When you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], reduce [gold]Iaido[/gold] by 2. [gold]Dexterity[/gold] amplifies [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_ZANXIN_POWER.title: Zanxin
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_ZANXIN_POWER.descrip: Your next [gold]Block[/gold] or [gold]Iaido[/gold] gain is increased by 1.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_MIST_SLASH_POWER.des: Your next [gold]Attack[/gold] with more than 1 hit gains {Amount} additional hits.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_QUICK_ABSORPTION_POW: Whenever you gain [gold]Iaido[/gold] this turn, gain {Amount} additional [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HEAVEN_MAY_POWER.des: Your [gold]Iaido[/gold] damages ALL enemies this turn.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_CONTINUOUS_CAST_POWE: Whenever you alternate [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] this turn, draw 1 card.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_CONVERSION_CAST_POWE: Whenever you alternate [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] this turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Zanxin[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_IAIDO_SURGE_POWER.de: This turn, all [gold]Iaido[/gold] counts as [gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_TAROT_WORLD_FREE_CHO: All [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards can freely choose to trigger their upright or reversed effect.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_TAROT_WORLD_DUAL_EFF: All [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards trigger both their upright and reversed effects.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_REVERSE_GESA_POWER.d: Double [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained from your next card.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_BLOOD_SPLASH_VIGOR_P: [gold]Vigor[/gold] has {Amount}x effect on Five Steps of Blood.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_SNOW_APPROACHING_POW: Take 20 damage at the end of the turn in {Amount} turns.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_SWORD_SAINT_HEART_PO: Whenever you trigger [gold]Iaido[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Vigor[/gold]. Whenever you trigger [gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold], gain 5 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_SWORD_HEART_REMAINS_: At the start of your turn, if you lost no HP last turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HYAKUHANHEI_POWER.de: When you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], reduce [gold]Iaido[/gold] by 1 instead. When you play a [gold]Skill[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HYAKUKYOUSHI_POWER.d: When you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain {Amount} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn. When you play a [gold]Skill[/gold], gain {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_FOOL_POWER.title: The Fool
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_FOOL_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, trigger The Fool's [gold]Tarot[/gold] effect.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_LOVERS_POWER.title: The Lovers
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_LOVERS_POWER.descrip: The next damage event triggers The Lovers' effect.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HERMIT_POWER.title: The Hermit
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_HERMIT_POWER.descrip: The next time you consume [gold]Vigor[/gold] or [gold]Zanxin[/gold], gain equal resources back.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_TENKA_FIVE_SWORDS_BO: [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Vigor[/gold] have {Amount}x effect on Tenka Five Swords.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_KACHUU_FUUGETSU_POWE: When played and at the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold], [gold]Iaido[/gold], [gold]Vigor[/gold], and [gold]Zanxin[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_KASSAI_JIZAI_POWER.d: Whenever you gain [gold]Iaido[/gold], gain {Amount} [gold]Vigor[/gold] per [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained.
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_SILVER_BOWL_SNOW_POW: All [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is converted into [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_CHARIOT_POWER.title: The Chariot
FEIYAP_POWER_FEIYAP_CHARIOT_POWER.descri: At the end of your turn, play {Amount} random cards from your Discard Pile.
